title: IIT Ropar – Project Assistant – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) Recruitment 2026 for 1 Project Assistant Post. Candidates with B.Tech or equivalent qualification Can Apply Through Email. The application process opens on 25-05-2026 and closes on 08-06-2026. The candidate shall apply through IIT Ropar website, iitrpr.ac.in.
